topStories.title: ICE agents deployed to US airports: Which airports are affected?
topStories.description: Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) officers were reportedly sent to 14 airports, including New York’s JFK.

topStories.title: Supreme Court adjourns Nimisha Priya case sine die
topStories.description: Supreme Court said it would take up the matter in case there is any fresh development

topStories.title: US-Israel war on Iran: What’s happening on day 25 of attacks?
topStories.description: Trump claims talks on with Iran, as he holds off on energy attacks, but Tehran denies any negotiations.

topStories.title: Religious conversion results in loss of Scheduled Caste status: Supreme Court
topStories.description: The court said a person professing a faith other than Hinduism, Sikhism, or Buddhism cannot claim the constitutional protections available to Scheduled Castes

topStories.title: US-Iran War: Defence Minister Rajnath Singh holds meeting on Middle East conflict, CDS, service chiefs attend
topStories.description: US-Iran War: The conflict in West Asia has entered its fourth week, disrupting trade routes through the Strait of Hormuz. Tensions escalated following the killing of 86-year-old Iran's Supreme Leader, Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, in joint military strikes by the US and Israel on February 28.

topStories.title: Women short service officers in defence forces to now get pension, rules Supreme Court
topStories.description: Under existing service rules, officers must complete 20 years to qualify for pension. SC invoked extraordinary powers to extend the benefit as a one-time relief

topStories.title: Markets Rally on Trump-Iran Talks Relief - Business Standard
topStories.description: Markets Rally on Trump-Iran Talks Relief  Business Standard

topStories.title: Vedanta shares jump 3% after company announces Rs 11 interim dividend
topStories.description: Vedanta shares saw a nearly 3% surge after the board approved a third interim dividend of Rs 11 per equity share, amounting to Rs 4,300 crore. This move comes despite recent stock declines due to a Supreme Court ruling on diesel procurement and a challenge to Adani Group's acquisition bid. The company remains a popular choice for dividend investors.

topStories.title: Trump administration deploys ICE agents at airports across US
topStories.description: The Trump administration has deployed ICE agents to airports across the United States.

topStories.title: US markets surge after Trump announces he’s postponing strikes on Iran
topStories.description: Major US financial markets opened higher after US President Donald Trump announced he was postponing strikes on Iran.

topStories.title: Supreme Court questions its registry over delay in listing PIL
topStories.description: A bench of CJI Surya Kant and justices Joymalya Bagchi and Vipul M Pancholi sought a report as to why the matter was not listed after February 2025

dailyNews.title: Is US-Iran war about to take a new turn? UAE and Saudi Arabia prepare to join conflict, says report
dailyNews.description: Gulf monarchies, long reluctant to be drawn into open hostilities, are now edging towards active participation as Iran escalates attacks on regional energy infrastructure and asserts claims over the Strait of Hormuz

dailyNews.title: Explosion at Valero's Port Arthur Refinery sends thick smoke plume into Texas sky | Video
dailyNews.description: Local authorities in Texas issued an immediate shelter-in-place order on Monday following an explosion at Valero’s Port Arthur refinery, as emergency crews responded to an active fire at the facility.

dailyNews.title: Donald Trump’s legacy: Will Republicans embrace his political vision, or has he left conservatism in the dust?
dailyNews.description: Is Trumpism a coherent ideology or gut impulse? Pete Wehner says MAGA has killed conservatism, but Trump's policy record tells a far more complex story.

dailyNews.title: Carville unloads on Maher, tells him to ‘get your head out of Bari Weiss’s a--’ in heated Trump rant
dailyNews.description: James Carville fires back at Bill Maher and reacts to Trump’s comments on Robert Mueller on Politicon podcast.

dailyNews.title: Department of Education under Trump just took its 'largest' step closer to shutting down
dailyNews.description: Student loan operations from a nearly $1.7 trillion portfolio are being transferred from the Department of Education to the Treasury under a new interagency agreement.

dailyNews.title: Park Police officer shot in Southeast DC suffers non life-threatening injuries as probe unfolds
dailyNews.description: A US Park Police officer was shot in Southeast Washington, D.C., the D.C. Police Union confirmed, prompting road closures near Queens Stroll Place SE.

dailyNews.title: Obama adviser reveals private conversations urging Biden not to run in 2016
dailyNews.description: The University of Virginia’s Miller Center published an interview with Obama strategist David Plouffe, who was tasked with informing Biden that he should not run for president in 2016.

dailyNews.title: Mullin confirmed as DHS chief as lawmakers near solution on shutdown standoff
dailyNews.description: Even with a new DHS chief, Senate Democrats aren't backing down from their demands for stringent reforms to ICE. And now President Donald Trump wants to pair funding with voter ID legislation.

dailyNews.title: Megan Moroney stuns in orange bikini during friend's Bahamas bachelorette
dailyNews.description: Megan Moroney hits the Bahamas for a friend's bachelorette trip and reveals she's covering Hannah Montana's 'Best of Both Worlds' for Spotify Singles.

dailyNews.title: Top House Dem dismisses probe into Jasmine Crockett’s security guard killed in SWAT standoff
dailyNews.description: Rep. Pete Aguilar questioned whether Congress should probe Rep. Jasmine Crockett hiring a convicted criminal for her taxpayer-funded security detail.

dailyNews.title: Joe Rogan rips Gavin Newsom for mocking Nick Shirley over his 'billion dollar' fraud investigations
dailyNews.description: Joe Rogan criticizes Gov. Gavin Newsom for mocking independent journalist Nick Shirley's fraud investigation, arguing Shirley is doing the work Newsom's government has failed to do.

dailyNews.title: NJ man crawls through window, attempts to sexually assault girl before being subdued by resident: police
dailyNews.description: A New Jersey resident is being credited with stopping a horrific home invasion after subduing a suspect who allegedly tried to sexually assault a sleeping girl.

topStories.title: Political traffic signals: waiting for the light to change on the Hill
topStories.description: Congress faces a steep political battle over a $200 billion Iran war spending request, with Trump sending mixed signals on whether the funds are needed.

topStories.title: Trump's death will be 'like Mardi Gras in New Orleans,' Charlamagne warns after Mueller post
topStories.description: Radio host Charlamagne Tha God warned President Donald Trump that people will celebrate his death "like Mardi Gras" after he celebrated Robert Mueller's death.

dailyNews.title: Trump's death will be 'like Mardi Gras in New Orleans,' Charlamagne warns after Mueller post
dailyNews.description: Radio host Charlamagne Tha God warned President Donald Trump that people will celebrate his death "like Mardi Gras" after he celebrated Robert Mueller's death.

dailyNews.title: Trump calls off Strait of Hormuz ultimatum as Iran receives U.S. message from mediators
dailyNews.description: As Iran threatens to mine the entire Persian Gulf, President Trump said his deadline for the Strait of Hormuz to reopen is postponed amid negotiations with Tehran.

dailyNews.title: 3/16: Face the Nation
dailyNews.description: This week on "Face the Nation with Margaret Brennan," as the U.S. launches airstrikes on Iran-backed Houthi rebels in Yemen, Margaret Brennan speaks to Secretary of State Marco Rubio. Plus, President Trump's envoy to the Middle East, Steve Witkoff, joins.

dailyNews.title: Trump postpones strikes on Iran's power plants after "productive conversations"
dailyNews.description: Iranian state media said there was no "direct or indirect communication" with President Trump, but a senior Iranian official later indicated they'd received communication from a mediator.

dailyNews.title: DHS funding talks in limbo after Trump insists GOP pass SAVE America Act
dailyNews.description: Senate talks aimed at ending the 38-day DHS shutdown hit a new roadblock after President Trump called on Republicans to hold out for passage of the SAVE America Act.

dailyNews.title: Markwayne Mullin confirmed as DHS secretary in 54-45 Senate vote
dailyNews.description: The Senate confirmed Markwayne Mullin as secretary of the Department of Homeland Security on Monday, finalizing President Trump's shakeup of DHS following months of scrutiny of Kristi Noem's leadership.

dailyNews.title: 3/23: The Takeout with Major Garrett
dailyNews.description: Two pilots die after an Air Canada Express flight hits a fire-rescue truck at LaGuardia Airport; Trump calls off his Strait of Hormuz ultimatum.

dailyNews.title: Iranians grieving over school missile strike express rage at U.S., Trump
dailyNews.description: Zahra Monazzah’s son Soheil was at an elementary school in Minab, in southern Iran, on Feb. 28 when a missile struck the building, killing him and dozens of other children.

dailyNews.title: Trump touts progress in talks with Iran
dailyNews.description: President Trump cited ‘major points of agreement’ in direct talks with the Iranian regime to end the war. But Iran denied there were any direct talks. NBC News’ Gabe Gutierrez reports.

dailyNews.title: Trump casts a mail ballot again in Florida even as he calls the method 'cheating'
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump cast a mail ballot in an upcoming Florida special election, according to Palm Beach County records, as he publicly condemns the voting method as fraudulent."Mail-in voting means mail-in cheating.

dailyNews.title: Pakistan moves to mediate between the U.S. and Iran as Trump says he's 'giving it five days'
dailyNews.description: Pakistan is joining a growing list of countries acting as go-betweens for the United States and Iran, four sources told NBC News, with two of those sources saying an in-person meeting could be held in the coming days in Islamabad, the Pakistani capital

dailyNews.title: Trump puts Republicans in a bind on the DHS shutdown: From the Politics Desk
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump rejected an off-ramp to the DHS shutdown and instead called on congressional Republicans to refuse any deal with Democrats unless they agree to pass the SAVE America Act.

dailyNews.title: Trump Delays Threat to Iran, but War Negotiations Are in Early Stage
dailyNews.description: President Trump postponed his threat to strike power plants in Iran, citing “productive conversations” with the Iranians. But officials said the talks were in an early stage and not substantive.
